heroSubtitle: Send bulk messages, deploy AI chatbots, manage your team inbox, run voice call campaigns and automate everything — no code needed.
worksWithTools: Works with tools you already use
connectPlatforms: Connect your favourite platforms in minutes — no engineering required.

transcriptLine1: Hi, I need help with my order.
transcriptLine2: Hi! Order #4821 is out for delivery — arriving by 3 PM today.
transcriptLine3: Can I change the delivery address?
transcriptLine4: Done! Address updated. Sending you a WhatsApp confirmation now.
aiFeature1Desc: Handles calls 24/7 using your trained knowledge base — no human agent needed.
aiFeature2Desc: Replies in under 1.2s, faster than any human support team.
aiFeature3Desc: Every call is transcribed and synced to your CRM in real time.
aiFeature4Desc: Routes complex queries to human agents and handles the rest automatically.
tabCallDesc: Deploy a voice AI agent that handles WhatsApp calls around the clock — qualifying leads, resolving support queries, and booking meetings automatically.
tabInboxDesc: Assign agents, add labels, write notes, filter conversations and reply — all from a single unified inbox. Works with WhatsApp API, QR, and Telegram.
tabFlowDesc: Drag nodes, connect steps, and launch chatbot flows in minutes. Automate WhatsApp and Telegram responses, route conversations, and trigger webhooks — zero developer needed.
otherFeaturesSubtitle: From connecting WhatsApp to deploying AI call agents — WhatsCRM gives your team every tool to automate, broadcast, and grow.
feature1Desc: Link via QR scan, Meta Embed Login, or manual API setup. Supports both WhatsApp QR Plugin and Meta Business API — all from one dashboard.
feature2Desc: Build powerful WhatsApp chatbots and automation flows with a drag-and-drop builder. Trigger actions, route conversations, and respond instantly — zero code.
feature3Desc: Create Meta-approved templates, send bulk campaigns to your phonebook, and track every message from a live campaign dashboard.
feature4Desc: Deploy an AI voice agent that handles WhatsApp calls 24/7. Build call flows, review call logs, and configure your setup — all without a human agent.
feature5Desc: Integrate WhatsCRM with any external tool using webhooks and the Meta REST API. Automate routing logic, sync data, and monitor every event in real time.
feature6Desc: Manage your entire support team from one unified inbox. Assign conversations to agents, track tasks, add a chat widget to your site, and monitor performance.
testimonialSubtitle: Real results from real teams — see how WhatsCRM helps businesses automate, grow, and delight customers on WhatsApp.
testimonial1Text: WhatsCRM completely transformed how we communicate with customers. Our open rates went from 20% to 94% overnight. Absolutely game-changing.
testimonial2Text: The chatbot builder is insanely powerful. We automated 80% of our support tickets in the first week. The ROI has been incredible.
testimonial3Text: Bulk broadcasting with Meta API is seamless. We ran a campaign to 50,000 contacts in minutes. Delivery rate blew us away.
pricingSubtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
ctaSubtext: Join 50,000+ businesses already using WhatsCRM to automate their WhatsApp marketing and support.
faqSubtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our support team and we'll get back to you within a few hours.
faqQ1: What is WhatsCRM and how does it work?
faqA1: WhatsCRM is a WhatsApp CRM and automation platform that connects to the official WhatsApp Business API. You can manage conversations, build chatbot flows, broadcast messages, and track analytics — all from one dashboard.
faqQ2: Do I need a verified WhatsApp Business account?
faqA2: For Cloud API access you'll need a Meta-verified WhatsApp Business account. For the QR connection option, any WhatsApp number works — great for getting started quickly without verification.
faqQ3: Is there a free trial available?
faqA3: Yes! Our 14-day free trial gives you access to core features with up to 100 contacts — no credit card required. You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime during or after the trial.
faqQ4: Can I broadcast messages to thousands of contacts?
faqA4: Absolutely. Our Bulk Broadcasting feature lets you send templated messages to thousands of contacts at once via the Meta Cloud API, with delivery tracking and open-rate analytics built in.
faqQ5: How does the AI chatbot builder work?
faqA5: The visual flow builder lets you design conversation trees with conditions, delays, and AI-powered responses — no coding needed. Flows trigger automatically based on keywords, events, or user actions.
faqQ6: Can multiple agents use the same WhatsApp number?
faqA6: Yes. Growth and higher plans support multiple agent accounts, so your entire support or sales team can collaborate on the same inbox with role-based access and chat assignments.
faqA7: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We are fully compliant with Meta's Business API policies and follow industry-standard security practices to keep your conversations and contact data safe.

webNotificationSub: Configure Firebase settings for web push notificaions
deniedSubtitle: You have blocked notifications for this site. Please update your browser settings to enable them.
defaultSubtitle: Toggle any switch below — your browser will ask for permission.
webPushDescription: Receive real-time notifications directly in your browser even when the app is in the background.
firebaseNotReady: Firebase is not ready yet. Please wait...
step1Desc: Click the 🔒 lock or info icon in your browser's address bar.
step2Desc: Look for the 'Notifications' setting in the site permissions dropdown.
step3Desc: Change the setting from 'Block' or 'Ask' to 'Allow'.
step4Desc: Refresh the page after changing the permission for it to take effect.
noteDesc: Steps may slightly vary depending on your browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari).
browserSetupGuideDesc: Expand your browser below for step-by-step push notification setup instructions.
braveAlertTitle: Brave blocks Google push services by default.
braveAlertDesc: Follow the steps below to enable FCM push notifications.
braveStep1Desc: Type brave://settings/privacy in your address bar and press Enter.
braveStep2Desc: Scroll down to "Privacy and security" section and find "Use Google services for push messaging" — toggle it ON.
braveStep3Desc: Go to brave://settings/content/notifications and make sure this site is in the Allowed list.
braveStep4Desc: Press Ctrl + Shift + R (Windows/Linux) or Cmd + Shift + R (Mac) to reload the page.
chromeStep1Desc: Click any notification toggle below — Chrome will show a permission popup. Click "Allow".
chromeStep2Desc: Click the 🔒 lock icon in the address bar → Site Settings → Notifications → Allow.
edgeStep1Desc: Toggle any switch below — Edge will show a permission popup. Click "Allow".
edgeStep2Desc: Click the 🔒 lock icon → Permissions for this site → Notifications → Allow.
edgeStep3Desc: If still not working, go to Edge notification settings and ensure the site is allowed.
operaStep1Desc: Toggle any switch below — Opera will show a permission popup. Click "Allow".
operaStep2Desc: Click the 🔒 lock icon in the address bar → Site Settings → Notifications → Allow.
operaStep3Desc: You can also manage notification permissions here:
firefoxStep1Desc: Toggle any switch below — Firefox will show a permission popup. Click "Allow Notifications".
firefoxStep2Desc: Click the 🔒 lock icon → Connection Secure → More Information → Permissions → Receive Notifications → Allow.
firefoxStep3Desc: Or manage all notification permissions here:
otherStep1Desc: Toggle any switch below — your browser should show a permission popup. Click Allow.
otherStep2Desc: Look for a 🔒 lock or ℹ️ info icon in your address bar → find Notifications → set to Allow.
otherStep3Title: Make Sure Your Browser Supports Push API
otherStep3Desc: Push notifications require a modern Chromium or Firefox-based browser. Very old browsers may not support it.
